message:
feat(context): add robot mode for context inject and unit tests

Add robot mode (--robot) support for context injection:
- Parse --robot-context-inject and --robot-context-inject-files flags
- Format and inject project context files in JSON output mode
- Support --robot-context-inject-max for size limiting
- Broadcast to all panes or target specific pane

Add 274 lines of unit tests for context injection covering:
- defaultContextFiles listing
- formatContextInjectContent with valid/missing/truncated files
- Edge cases for empty file lists and max-bytes limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
